  "description": "Kabsa Facility Managers Limited&nbsp;is a skills ecosystem hub that offers a wide range of facility management services to clients of all categories. Our multi-modal services cut across facility repairs and maintenance services to human resource management, consulting, and contract management services. We undertake technical and direct artisanship services such as handyman, painting, tiling, electrical and plumbing repairs, property management, and real estate agency services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Personal Assistant &ndash; Corporate Affairs

Job Location:&nbsp;Asokoro, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking a highly organised Personal Assistant to manage household and domestic operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage household schedules and routines
	Coordinate domestic staff and vendors
	Handle personal logistics and errands
	Support family coordination needs.


Requirements


	3 - 5 years of experience in household or PA roles
	Strong organisational and coordination skills
	Ability to manage staff and routines
	High discretion and reliability.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CVs and cover letters to:&nbsp;ekasaarh@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Personal Assistant &ndash; Corporate Affairs&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Personal Assistant – Corporate Affairs Job at Kabsa Facility Managers Limited




        
    

        
        Kabsa Facility Managers Limited is a skills ecosystem hub that offers a wide range of facility management services to clients of all categories. Our multi-modal services cut across facility repairs and maintenance services to human resource management, consulting, and contract management services. We undertake technical and direct artisanship services such as handyman, painting, tiling, electrical and plumbing repairs, property management, and real estate agency services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant – Corporate Affairs

Job Location: Asokoro, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly organised Personal Assistant to manage household and domestic operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage household schedules and routines
	Coordinate domestic staff and vendors
	Handle personal logistics and errands
	Support family coordination needs.


Requirements


	3 - 5 years of experience in household or PA roles
	Strong organisational and coordination skills
	Ability to manage staff and routines
	High discretion and reliability.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and cover letters to: [email protected] using "Personal Assistant – Corporate Affairs" as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Network Administrator",
  "description": "AB Microfinance Bank is a national microfinance bank licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), with its head office in Lagos and branches spread across Lagos, Oyo, Ogun, Ondo and Anambra State.


AB Microfinance Bank Nigeria is committed to its passion of helping to improve the business opportunities of entrepreneurs by availing them of easy access to affordable loans, as well as improve the general financial status of everyone with its deposit accounts. It is a limited liability company duly incorporated in Nigeria under the 2002 Companies and Allied Matters Act, and is regulated by the Central Bank of Nigeria as a fully fledged microfinance bank.

The Bank has an exceptional group of very strong international shareholders committed to the task of improving access to financial services in the country. These shareholders are Access Microfinance Holding AG of Germany, KfW - the German Development Bank, the African Development Bank, and the International Finance Corporation of the World Bank Group. Together, they have an established record of setting up and managing microfinance banks across the African and Asian continents in such countries as Nigeria, Tanzania, Liberia, Zambia, Rwanda, Madagascar, Azerbaijan, Tajikistan,Georgia and Brazil.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Network Administrator

Ref Code: NA/IT/APR/2026
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Main Responsibilities


	Plan, deploy, configure and maintain router and switches, administrative responsibility for the entire networking infrastructure.
	Operate and administrate network devices (5G modems, routers, switches and firewalls)
	Plan detailed concept of LAN / VLAN / WAN for all bank locations via connect to ISP
	Design a network concept and create lifecycle plan for network devices
	Backup and setup of network configurations
	Proactive analysis of logging data to help to prevent system down time &ndash; communicate system or network events, troubleshoots problems and ensure uptime of network devices
	Patch management for network devices
	Maintain and update documentation of network design
	Plan and configure network security at the banking network
	Manage IP-routing and network capacity
	Install and manage data center racking, cabling, power, network devices.


Necessary experience, skills and knowledge


	Minimum of a B.Sc. / HND Degree in Information Technology or Business Information Technology or comparable qualification
	Cognate Networking Certification(s) will be an added advantage.
	At least 2 years of professional experience in a similar role is highly required.
	Network administration (up-to-date Cisco router and switch, Fortigate firewalls, operation system IOS, network connections), patch management, scripting, access control lists
	Configuration of firewall, TCP/IP, DNS and DHCP
	IT security tools and methods of as VPN and SSH
	Backup and recovery procedures for routers, switches and firewalls
	Problem solving, analytical and process oriented
	Disciplined approach towards daily operations and documentation.



&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-21",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Network Administrator Job at AB Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        AB Microfinance Bank is a national microfinance bank licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), with its head office in Lagos and branches spread across Lagos, Oyo, Ogun, Ondo and Anambra State.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




AB Microfinance Bank Nigeria is committed to its passion of helping to improve the business opportunities of entrepreneurs by availing them of easy access to affordable loans, as well as improve the general financial status of everyone with its deposit accounts. It is a limited liability company duly incorporated in Nigeria under the 2002 Companies and Allied Matters Act, and is regulated by the Central Bank of Nigeria as a fully fledged microfinance bank.

The Bank has an exceptional group of very strong international shareholders committed to the task of improving access to financial services in the country. These shareholders are Access Microfinance Holding AG of Germany, KfW - the German Development Bank, the African Development Bank, and the International Finance Corporation of the World Bank Group. Together, they have an established record of setting up and managing microfinance banks across the African and Asian continents in such countries as Nigeria, Tanzania, Liberia, Zambia, Rwanda, Madagascar, Azerbaijan, Tajikistan,Georgia and Brazil.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Network Administrator

Ref Code: NA/IT/APR/2026
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Main Responsibilities


	Plan, deploy, configure and maintain router and switches, administrative responsibility for the entire networking infrastructure.
	Operate and administrate network devices (5G modems, routers, switches and firewalls)
	Plan detailed concept of LAN / VLAN / WAN for all bank locations via connect to ISP
	Design a network concept and create lifecycle plan for network devices
	Backup and setup of network configurations
	Proactive analysis of logging data to help to prevent system down time – communicate system or network events, troubleshoots problems and ensure uptime of network devices
	Patch management for network devices
	Maintain and update documentation of network design
	Plan and configure network security at the banking network
	Manage IP-routing and network capacity
	Install and manage data center racking, cabling, power, network devices.


Necessary experience, skills and knowledge


	Minimum of a B.Sc. / HND Degree in Information Technology or Business Information Technology or comparable qualification
	Cognate Networking Certification(s) will be an added advantage.
	At least 2 years of professional experience in a similar role is highly required.
	Network administration (up-to-date Cisco router and switch, Fortigate firewalls, operation system IOS, network connections), patch management, scripting, access control lists
	Configuration of firewall, TCP/IP, DNS and DHCP
	IT security tools and methods of as VPN and SSH
	Backup and recovery procedures for routers, switches and firewalls
	Problem solving, analytical and process oriented
	Disciplined approach towards daily operations and documentation.



     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Job Openings at Xpedient Services
content:
Xpedient Services is a leading indigenous human resource management firm, empowering businesses of all sizes to thrive. We go beyond traditional HR services, offering a comprehensive suite of solutionsto streamline your operations, cultivate ahigh-performing workforce, and achieve your strategic goals.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Experienced Housekeeper - Live-in (Male)

Job Location: Wuye Phase 2, Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A family in Abuja is seeking a highly experienced, discreet, and professional Male Housekeeper to manage the daily upkeep and maintenance of their shared living space.
	The ideal candidate must be meticulous, trustworthy, well-organized, and able to maintain a high standard of cleanliness and order with minimal supervision.


Key Responsibilities
Housekeeping & Cleaning:


	Maintain overall cleanliness of the entire residence to premium standards
	Daily cleaning of all living areas, bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen, and common spaces
	Deep cleaning on scheduled days (including dusting, polishing, scrubbing, and vacuuming)
	Proper handling and use of cleaning supplies and equipment
	Ensure all surfaces, fixtures, and furniture are always well-maintained and presentable.


Laundry & Wardrobe Care:


	Washing, ironing, folding, and proper arrangement of clothing
	Care for delicate fabrics and designer clothing according to instructions
	Organize wardrobes and ensure neat storage systems are maintained.


Kitchen & Basic Support:


	Maintain cleanliness of kitchen at all times
	Wash dishes and ensure kitchen equipment is properly arranged after use
	Assist in light kitchen organization (no cooking required unless requested).


House Organization:


	Ensure all household items are properly arranged and stored
	Monitor and report low supplies (cleaning materials, toiletries, etc.)
	Maintain a tidy and clutter-free environment at all times


Security & Discretion:


	Maintain confidentiality and respect household privacy at all times
	Report any unusual activity or maintenance concerns promptly
	Ensure doors, windows, and gates are properly secured when necessary.


General Maintenance Support:


	Basic supervision of household cleanliness standards
	Report minor repairs or maintenance needs immediately
	Assist with arranging maintenance personnel when required.


Requirements


	5 - 8 years of Proven experience as a professional housekeeper in private, household
	Strong attention to detail and cleanliness standards
	Ability to work independently without constant supervision
	High level of integrity, honesty, and discretion
	Physically fit and able to handle daily cleaning duties
	Good communication skills (basic English required)
	Must be respectful, well-groomed, and professional in appearance.


Preferred Qualities:


	Experience working premium private households
	Minimum of HND and any relevant Bsc degree
	Understanding of modern cleaning techniques and equipment
	Long-term commitment mindset
	Calm, disciplined, and trustworthy personality.


Working Conditions:


	Full-time position
	Shared living space environment
	Structured daily routine with clear expectations
	Respectful and professional household setting.


Salary


	Highly Competitive (based on experiences).


Application Closing Date: 22nd May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Educator -Nanny (Live-in)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a highly experienced and educated Educator-Nanny to provide structured childcare and academic support for a 5-year-old child within a private household in Lagos.
	This role requires a candidate with a strong background in early childhood education who can combine nurturing care with intentional learning.
	The ideal candidate will create a stimulating home environment that supports the child’s academic readiness, creativity, and overall development.


Key Responsibilities
Childcare & Daily Care:


	Provide attentive, safe, and nurturing care at all times
	Oversee the child’s daily routine including feeding, hygiene, and rest
	Maintain a structured and consistent daily schedule


Educational Support:


	Plan and deliver age-appropriate learning activities (literacy, numeracy, phonics, etc.)
	Support homework and reinforce school learning
	Encourage reading, storytelling, and creative expression
	Monitor developmental progress and provide feedback to parents


Behavioral & Social Development:


	Instill discipline, good manners, and positive values
	Encourage independence, confidence, and social skills
	Support emotional well-being and positive behavior management


Household Duties (Child-Focused):


	Prepare nutritious meals and snacks for the child
	Handle the child’s laundry, ironing, and wardrobe management
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the child’s room and play areas
	Pack school bags and lunchboxes daily


Activity & Routine Management:


	Plan engaging indoor and outdoor activities
	Accompany the child to school, extracurricular activities, and appointments when required


Requirements


	Degree or certification in Early Childhood Education, Education, or a related field
	Minimum of 5-8years of experience as a teacher, governess, or educator-nanny
	Strong understanding of child development (ages 4–6)
	Excellent communication skills (spoken and written English)
	Patient, nurturing, firm, and well-organized
	Ability to implement structured learning within a home environment
	Energetic and proactive


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience working in a private household
	Familiarity with phonics, Montessori, or other early learning methods


Salary and Benefits


	N150,000 monthly (Based on experience and qualifications)
	Feeding Allowance: 50,000.


Application Closing Date: 30th April, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Experienced Nanny

Job Location: Asokoro, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A private family in Asokoro is seeking a mature and experienced nanny to support the care of three children (5years 4years, & 7 months Old).
	The role will be shared with an existing nanny.


Responsibilities


	Full childcare support (infant to early years).
	Assist with homework and developmental activities.
	School drop-off and pick-up.
	Pack lunchboxes.
	Supervise bath time and routines.
	Manage children’s laundry (washing & ironing).
	Clean and maintain children’s rooms.
	Support general tidiness of shared spaces.
	Supervise extracurricular activities.


Working Relationship


	This role is designed as a shared-care position, working alongside an existing nanny.
	The successful candidate must be team-oriented, respectful, and adaptable to an already established household structure.


Requirements


	Experienced with infants and young children.
	Mature (older candidates preferred).
	Good communication skills.
	Clean, organized, and proactive.
	Team player (will work with another nanny).
	Age: 28 - 40 years old.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 29th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Audit Specialist",
  "description": "Unified Payment is a fast-leading financial technology company that provides seamless, secure, and efficient digital payment solutions. We enable businesses and individuals to send, receive, and manage payments across multiple channels through a single, integrated platform, driving financial inclusion, operational efficiency, and innovation in the digital payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Audit Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives


	To provide independent assurance to management on IT General Controls.
	Ensure best assurance practice in the plan and execution of IS Audit Programs.
	Ensure enterprise wide compliance of business processes and operations to internal policies, procedures and documentations.
	Incorporation of standard practices, principles and processes into audit programs and execution.
	Review of risk related control issues and draft appriopriate remediation plans.
	Understand the business environment and develop relationships with audit client in providing value added solutions and best practices implementation.


Duties &amp; / Responsibilities


	Audit Review of Database Management Systems, Enterprise Network security and Device configuration, Antivirus, Systems Patches and Log Management.
	Audit Review of Software Development Life cycle, Project Management Implementation and Change Management Procedures.
	Audit Review of Data Encryption Processes, Key Management Lifecycle, and Operating Systems, physical and logical security of card holder environment.
	Audit Review of Active Directory, Operating Systems, Data backup and tape management.
	Assess systems and general IT controls and provide practical and Value added remediation plans.
	Prepare audit reports that summarize the most significant control weaknesses and resulting impact to the organization.
	Participate in multiple and simultaneous risk? Contribute to internal departmental initiatives such as trainings, departmental development initiatives and other internal projects as requested.
	Effectively discuss audit issues and develop business focused controls recommendations to strengthen control lapses and weaknesses based audit while maintaining departmental quality standards. Function as part of a team or work independently when requires.


Requirements
Education:


	University: First Degree(s) in Information Technology, Computer Science, or Related field. OTHERS: Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA), Certified Information Security Manager (CISM), or related professional certifications would be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 6- 10 years of experience in IT Auditing or a similar role.
	Understanding of the key technology and general controls around enterprise Applications and information systems.
	Candidate must possess the ability to Communicate effectively audit issues and remediation plans.


Knowledge:


	Knowledge of Systems and General IT Controls.
	Analytical skills to access Operational and Compliance Requirements of Application Systems and infrastructure.
	Strong Data Analysis and experience with Computer Assisted Auditing Techniques.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;mercy.joseph@up-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

IT Audit Specialist Job at Unified Payment




        
    

        
        Unified Payment is a fast-leading financial technology company that provides seamless, secure, and efficient digital payment solutions. We enable businesses and individuals to send, receive, and manage payments across multiple channels through a single, integrated platform, driving financial inclusion, operational efficiency, and innovation in the digital payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Audit Specialist

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To provide independent assurance to management on IT General Controls.
	Ensure best assurance practice in the plan and execution of IS Audit Programs.
	Ensure enterprise wide compliance of business processes and operations to internal policies, procedures and documentations.
	Incorporation of standard practices, principles and processes into audit programs and execution.
	Review of risk related control issues and draft appriopriate remediation plans.
	Understand the business environment and develop relationships with audit client in providing value added solutions and best practices implementation.


Duties & / Responsibilities


	Audit Review of Database Management Systems, Enterprise Network security and Device configuration, Antivirus, Systems Patches and Log Management.
	Audit Review of Software Development Life cycle, Project Management Implementation and Change Management Procedures.
	Audit Review of Data Encryption Processes, Key Management Lifecycle, and Operating Systems, physical and logical security of card holder environment.
	Audit Review of Active Directory, Operating Systems, Data backup and tape management.
	Assess systems and general IT controls and provide practical and Value added remediation plans.
	Prepare audit reports that summarize the most significant control weaknesses and resulting impact to the organization.
	Participate in multiple and simultaneous risk? Contribute to internal departmental initiatives such as trainings, departmental development initiatives and other internal projects as requested.
	Effectively discuss audit issues and develop business focused controls recommendations to strengthen control lapses and weaknesses based audit while maintaining departmental quality standards. Function as part of a team or work independently when requires.


Requirements
Education:


	University: First Degree(s) in Information Technology, Computer Science, or Related field. OTHERS: Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA), Certified Information Security Manager (CISM), or related professional certifications would be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 6- 10 years of experience in IT Auditing or a similar role.
	Understanding of the key technology and general controls around enterprise Applications and information systems.
	Candidate must possess the ability to Communicate effectively audit issues and remediation plans.


Knowledge:


	Knowledge of Systems and General IT Controls.
	Analytical skills to access Operational and Compliance Requirements of Application Systems and infrastructure.
	Strong Data Analysis and experience with Computer Assisted Auditing Techniques.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
